name: Robby Mook, Official Clinton Campaign
subject: Hillary needs you
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
body:
What Jeb Bush just announced: | Friend --

Jeb Bush has raised $114 million in the last six months.

His team called it the "shock and awe" approach to fundraising.

We're not shocked, and we're certainly not in awe. But let me be clear -- this is a big problem for us.

We may not be able to keep pace with Jeb but we believe that a grassroots movement funded by and for everyday Americans can take him on.

Hillary's counting on it.

**Donate $1 or more to stand with her:**

**[https://www.hillaryclinton.com/donate/](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=12&ms=MjMwMTc5NTcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjAwOTAzNTkxS0&mt=1&rt=0)**

Thanks,

Robby

Robby Mook
Campaign Manager
Hillary for America

| | PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
---
Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This is your campaign, so if you have thoughts on anything at all, just [click here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=18&ms=MjMwMTc5NTcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjAwOTAzNTkxS0&mt=1&rt=0) to send us a message! Getting emails from Hillary for America is one of the best ways to stay in touch with this campaign, but if you really want to scale back, click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjMwMTc5NTcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjAwOTAzNTkxS0&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the campaign on [Facebook](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjMwMTc5NTcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjAwOTAzNTkxS0&mt=1&rt=0), [Twitter](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjMwMTc5NTcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjAwOTAzNTkxS0&mt=1&rt=0), and [Instagram](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=13&ms=MjMwMTc5NTcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjAwOTAzNTkxS0&mt=1&rt=0). Thanks so much for doing everything you can to elect Hillary Clinton as our next president.
Hillary for America, P.O. Box 5256, New York, NY 10185
[Privacy Policy](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=MjMwMTc5NTcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjAwOTAzNTkxS0&mt=1&rt=0)

name: randhpaulmd@yahoo.com
subject: This could get ugly
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Fellow Conservative:

Not one penny.

I am introducing legislation that will stop the flow of taxpayer money to sanctuary cities.

**[Will you stand with me in the fight to end sanctuary cities once-and-for-all](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28977015:27819975183:m:1:879035888:091DB47A42641870B36B2861E8DD32AC:r)**?

For decades, politicians connected to the Washington Machine have mouthed words about securing our borders.

And they've broken every promise.

Last night I appeared on Fox News Channel's _Off the Record_ to introduce my plan to end sanctuary cities.

I hope you will take a few moments to watch my interview.

Fellow Conservative, the culture of lawlessness President Obama created over immigration in America MUST end.

As constitutional conservatives, we believe in the rule of law.

But sanctuary cities make a mockery of this concept when they morph into magnets for illegal immigrants.

Criminals and gang members who have been deported multiple times know they will be safe as long as they stay within the cities' borders.

And we know terrorist organizations are looking to exploit our porous southern border to gain entry to the United States.

The liberal media will reach into their well-worn playbook to hurl smears at me.

I'm going to be called every name in the book.

I know it could get ugly, but I'm prepared to make my stand.

But I need to know if you are with me.

**[So please take a few moments to watch my interview and sign your"Enforce Immigration Laws Now" petition right away](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28977015:27819975183:m:1:879035888:091DB47A42641870B36B2861E8DD32AC:r)**.

And after you sign your petition, please chip in a contribution of $20.16 so my campaign can take my message of ending sanctuary cities to the voters in the early caucus and primary states.

| | [Chip in $10 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28977016:27819975183:m:1:879035888:091DB47A42641870B36B2861E8DD32AC:r)
---

[Chip in $50 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28977018:27819975183:m:1:879035888:091DB47A42641870B36B2861E8DD32AC:r)
[Chip in $100 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28977019:27819975183:m:1:879035888:091DB47A42641870B36B2861E8DD32AC:r)
[Or donate another amount >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28977015:27819975183:m:1:879035888:091DB47A42641870B36B2861E8DD32AC:r)

In Liberty,

Rand Paul

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28977015:27819975183:m:1:879035888:091DB47A42641870B36B2861E8DD32AC:r)

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28977020:27819975183:m:1:879035888:091DB47A42641870B36B2861E8DD32AC:r) [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28977021:27819975183:m:1:879035888:091DB47A42641870B36B2861E8DD32AC:r) [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28977022:27819975183:m:1:879035888:091DB47A42641870B36B2861E8DD32AC:r)

name: Team Murphy
subject: Who do you endorse?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida
body:
| Patrick needs your endorsement. Friend -- Cory Booker is in. So are Lois Frankel and Charlie Crist. Will you join them? [**We need you to step up and endorse Patrick for U.S. Senate. Will you add your name as an endorser today?**](http://act.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae206d/738133e4/39013fcd/7f9e81be/50170233/VEsH/ "http://www.murphyforflorida.com/endorse?refcode=ema_2015-07-10_b1_tm") 50 elected officials have endorsed Patrick for Senate. That's because they know he's the Democrat who can win, and the candidate who will best serve the people of Florida in the Senate. All that's missing is you. Will you join us and endorse Patrick today? [**Say you're in. Endorse Patrick Murphy for U.S. Senate today.**](http://act.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae206d/738133e4/39013fcd/7f9e81be/50170233/VEsE/ "http://www.murphyforflorida.com/endorse?refcode=ema_2015-07-10_b1_tm") Thank you for endorsing Patrick. name: Bernie Sanders
subject: This is not democracy
body:
#
Friend -
Yesterday afternoon, Jeb Bush announced that a relatively small number of wealthy donors have contributed over **one hundred million dollars** to his Super PAC.
This is not a democracy. This is oligarchy.
Unfortunately, Jeb Bush is not alone. Almost all of our opponents have embraced this model of fundraising -- begging billionaire benefactors who have bought up the private sector to try their hand at buying a presidential election.
One of those Super PACs is already running ads against our campaign.
**Let me be clear: I am more than aware our opponents will outspend us, but we are going to win this election. They have the money, but we have the people.**
[**Add your $3 contribution to our campaign today and help fuel the political revolution this moment requires.**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2078/43f17890/5c1bda93/621d87f8/2087105709/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/our-democracy?refcode=em150710a")
The economic and political systems of this country are stacked against ordinary Americans. The rich get richer and use their wealth to buy elections.
It's up to us to change the course for our country.
Thank you for answering the call.
Bernie Sanders

[](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2078/43f17890/5c1bda93/621d87f8/2087105709/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/our-democracy?refcode=em150710a")

Paid for by Bernie 2016
PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2078/43f17890/5c1bda93/621d87f9/2087105709/VEsF/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2078/43f17890/5c1bda93/621d87e6/2087105709/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjIwOTAyIn0=/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2078/43f17890/5c1bda93/621d87e7/2087105709/VEsD/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Stand against the powerful special interests who are systematically buying our Congress and have their sights set on the presidency by [contributing to Bernie here](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2078/43f17890/5c1bda93/621d87e4/2087105709/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer").

One of those Super PACs is already running ads against our campaign. Let me be clear: I am more than aware our opponents will outspend us, but we are going to win this election. They have the money, but we have the people. "" The economic and political systems of this country are stacked against ordinary Americans. The rich get richer and use their wealth to buy elections. name: Lucy Nashed, Perry 2016
subject: "Show me, don't tell me."
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Perry for President, Inc
body:
| | **** Dear Friend,
**
As Gov. Perry often says, 2016 is going to be a "show me, don't tell me" election. **And when it comes to protecting our nation's southern border, Gov. Perry has a record of accomplishment that is second to none.

**When the federal government failed at its constitutional duty to secure our border, Gov. Perry acted.
**
Under his leadership, Texas dedicated nearly a billion dollars to border security measures, putting our own state law enforcement, Texas Rangers and National Guard on the front lines. This led to a 74% decrease in apprehensions - those are real results.

**A lot of candidates in this race talk a big game, but that 's all they offer: talk. **We need a president in the White House who knows firsthand the consequences of our unsecured border, and who will act once and for all to protect our national security. But he can't do it alone - [_please consider donating $5, $10, $25 or what you can today_](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MjMwMjQzMTUS1&r=MTIxNTA5NzYyMjAxS0&b=0&j=NjAwOTk1ODUwS0&mt=1&rt=0) \- to help us spread the Governor's record of results in Texas across our great country.

Best,

Lucy Nashed
Communications Director, Perry for President

[](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MjMwMjQzMTUS1&r=MTIxNTA5NzYyMjAxS0&b=0&j=NjAwOTk1ODUwS0&mt=1&rt=0)

**
**
---
Paid for by Perry for President, Inc.
| | This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com This message reflects the opinions and representations of Perry for President, Inc.

If you would prefer not to receive future emails from Perry for President, Inc. click [here](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ui/modules/display/optOut.jsp?&m=23024315&r=MTIxNTA5NzYyMjAxS0&j=NjAwOTk1ODUwS0&mt=1&rt=0).
[](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/servlet/OneClickOptOutServlet?m=23024315&r=MTIxNTA5NzYyMjAxS0&b=0&j=NjAwOTk1ODUwS0&mt=1&rt=0)
---
